The '''pressure tank''' was a long, cylinder-shaped freight [[Cargo container/Legends|container]] designed to store gases during transit in space. The tank, manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]], was commonly encountered throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It could be used to store gases, such as [[propane]]. It was also used for interstellar transport of more valuable gases such as [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]].

Like similar cargo containers, the pressure tank could be transported through the use of [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], including the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]], [[container transport]], and [[modular conveyor]]. [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] and [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]] were also capable of carrying pressure tanks.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
